ANT COLONY The queen ant is central to the ant colony's survival and prosperity, laying eggs and being protected by worker ants QUEEN ANT. ANT COLONY Worker ants are integral members of the ant colony, playing a crucial role in its survival and prosperity. They are responsible for performing essential tasks such as foraging for food, caring for the young, and maintaining and building the nest. These activities support the ant colony, ensuring its growth and the well-being of its members. Through their diligent work, worker ants contribute significantly to the functioning and organization of the colony, demonstrating the importance of their role within the ant community. WORKER ANTS.
